next_steps_required_for_launch.item: Install Google Tag AW-18095957436 on primevilla.ph
Create Brevo account at app.brevo.com and capture API key
Create WATI account at app.wati.io, capture Client ID, define sales agent identity
Set up HubSpot (or alternative CRM) with one pipeline: New, Qualified, Meeting Scheduled, Reservation Paid, Contract, Closed

Provision Google Sheet 'Panglao Prime Villas - Lead Form Responses' with full schema (submitted_at, name, email, phone, country, villa_interest, investment_amount, timeline, utm_*, language). Record sheetId and tab name in campaign_state.json and _status/lead_check_state.json.
Build primevilla.ph lead form posting to that Sheet with UTM passthrough
Authorize Google Drive MCP (or install Sheets-native MCP) for unattended access
Resolve Google Ads advertiser verification on customer 4031838704
Reconcile ad account ID mismatch: update campaign_state.json.platforms.meta_ads.ad_account_id from 120244375418610326 to live MCP value 2015125296073673 (after confirming with Business Manager)
Resolve IL pricing mismatch. Recommended source of truth: CLAUDE.md (1,535,000 / 1,650,000 / 9,999 ILS). Align campaign_state.json.il_fixed_pricing to match.
Create at least one Meta Lead Ads form on Blue Everest Asset Group page and one Google Ads Lead Form asset
Generate _queue/2026-06-02/tasks_*.json (content, ads, email, whatsapp, lead) so scheduled agents have work tomorrow
Reconcile scheduled-tasks cron to documented PHT slots or update SKILL prompts to match actual fire times
Investigate why AFTERNOON_OPS missed today (and 6 of 7 days last week). Should emit a stub even in PREPARATION mode.
Once all above green: set start_date and go_live_date in campaign_state.json, flip simulation to false, allow live ops
